item.title: Soaring coffee prices rewrite some Americans' daily routines
item.description: Rising coffee prices are changing how some Americans get their caffeine

item.title: White Castle transforms restaurants for Valentine's Day themed dinners that create memories
item.description: White Castle has invited lovers, loved ones and the soon-to-be in love to an intimate meal at its restaurants every Valentine's Day for the past 35 ye...

item.title: Hundreds of agents search for Nancy Guthrie as her case spotlights other families left behind
item.description: Nancy Guthrieâs disappearance highlights how differently police respond when a case draws national attention

item.title: Mandatory driver impairment sensors clear a funding hurdle, but are they ready?
item.description: A federal law requires new cars to include technology that detects drunk or impaired driving, but regulators still have not cleared it

item.title: What we can learn from lovebirds, the rare birds that mate for life
item.description: Phoenix is believed to be home to the world's largest colony of rosy-faced lovebirds outside of their native Africa
